Movement & Productivity

Exploring the relationship between daily physical activity and academic output — Feb 10 through Apr 2, 2026.

Dual-Encoded Calendar Heatmap

Each cell represents one day. Fill Color encodes step count: darker pink = more steps. Borders indicate num assignments completed; darker border = more assignments. Click a cell to see that day's details.

Steps
Miles
Active Cal
Flights
Study Hrs
Assignments
